title: Silken Depths
description: Infested Caves rework with Pale Garden blocks from Vanilla Backports
body:
![Silken Depths](https://i.imgur.com/RaliV7e.jpeg)
## 🕸️ About:
**Silken Depths** is a small datapack that brings the Infested Cave design of the new versions of **Terralith with** Pale Garden blocks from **VanillaBackports!**
Here's a short list of the changes makes:

- Blue Trees from the biome Moonlight Grove/Valley now use the Pale Oak Log.
- The Infested Caves now have a new design, with Pale Moss blocks around it and with some features that bring decoration, such as hanging moss and spider eggs.
- Added the **#terralith:caves** biome tag for quickly locating a cave biomes.

This is a small datapack that I made for my own project, so don't expect further updates.

I hope you enjoy it!

## 📋 Technical details:
**⚠ Requires VanillaBackports with Platform API.**
